action.content:
Write a professional email that you could send to ask your boss for a raise. At the end of your response, explicitly add a postscript starting with P.P.S

Finish your entire response with this exact phrase: Hope you agree with me.
action.label: context

action.content:
Subject: Request for Meeting Regarding Compensation Review

Dear [Boss's Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to request a brief meeting to discuss my current role and compensation. Over the past [Number] years, I have had the opportunity to take on significant responsibilities, including [mention 1-2 key achievements or projects], which have directly contributed to [mention a specific positive outcome for the company].

Given my expanded scope of work and the value I believe I continue to bring to the team, I would like to review my current salary to ensure it aligns with my contributions and the current market standards for this level of responsibility. I am confident that we can find a mutually beneficial solution that reflects my dedication and the results I have delivered.

Please let me know if you have any availability next week for a 30-minute discussion on this matter. I look forward to your response.

Best regards,

[Your Name]

P.P.S. I have attached a summary of my recent projects and metrics for your reference prior to our meeting.

Hope you agree with me.
action.label: response
